title: agrostis lindeniana
intro: Agrostis lindeniana, also known as blue bent or linden bent, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Agrostis lindeniana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm respiratory problems, and reduce fever, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Agrostis lindeniana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments.
